server/tests/test_service.py :: test_convert_image_png_to_jpeg
def test_convert_image_png_to_jpeg() -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(12, 12, 30, 60, 90))
    output, target = convert_image(payload, "input.png", "jpg", max_mb=2)
    assert target.extension == "jpg"
    assert output.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")

server/tests/test_service.py :: test_convert_image_to_gif
def test_convert_image_to_gif() -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(20, 16, 200, 50, 50))
    output, target = convert_image(payload, "input.png", "gif", max_mb=2)
    assert target.extension == "gif"
    assert output.startswith(b"GIF89a")

server/tests/test_service.py :: test_convert_image_with_crop
def test_convert_image_with_crop() -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(solid_raster(32, 32, 10, 20, 30))
    edits = EditOptions(crop_x=4, crop_y=4, crop_width=16, crop_height=16)
    output, target = convert_image(payload, "input.png", "png", max_mb=2, edits=edits)
    assert target.extension == "png"
    assert output.startswith(b"\x89PNG")

server/tests/test_service.py :: test_convert_png_to_jpeg_with_post_filter
def test_convert_png_to_jpeg_with_post_filter() -> None:
    payload = png_bytes(gradient_raster(20, 16))
    edits = EditOptions(filter_name="none", post_filter="blur")
    output, target = convert_image(payload, "input.png", "jpg", max_mb=2, edits=edits)
    assert target.extension == "jpg"
    assert output.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")
